description:
Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage containing a job named job that runs on Windows runners. The job should be excluded from tag pipelines (except tags). In the job script, first echo "Restoring NuGet Packages...", then run "c:
uget
uget.exe" restore "Xeris.Source.sln" and "c:
uget
uget.exe" restore "Xeris.Modules.sln", then echo "Release build...", and finally build both solutions in Release configuration using msbuild.exe with /consoleloggerparameters:ErrorsOnly /maxcpucount /nologo /property:Configuration=Release /verbosity:quiet for "Xeris.Source.sln" and "Xeris.Modules.sln". No Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
